paper_title: Core KY07-04 PC01 and its age model

methods.description: Process for obtaining a piston core sample from the Okinawa Trough for paleoceanographic study.

steps.description: A piston core sample KY07-04 PC01 was obtained from a water depth of 758 m on the northern slope of the Okinawa Trough, East China Sea during the R/V Kaiyo KY07-04 cruise in February 2007.
steps.searchable_summary: collect piston core sample from Okinawa Trough

methods.description: Procedure for establishing and revising the age model of Core KY07-04 PC01 using radiocarbon dating and tephrochronology.

steps.description: The age model of KY07-04 PC01 was established based on 18 radiocarbon dating of planktic foraminiferal shells and tephrochronology.
steps.searchable_summary: establish age model using radiocarbon dating and tephrochronology

steps.description: This study revised the Core KY07-04 PC01 age model with 26 radiocarbon dating of planktic foraminiferal shells.
steps.searchable_summary: revise age model with additional radiocarbon dating

steps.description: New radiocarbon dates for eight samples during the middle to late Holocene interval were measured by the National Electrostatics Corporation 250 kV single-stage accelerator mass spectrometry.
steps.searchable_summary: measure radiocarbon dates using accelerator mass spectrometry

steps.description: We conducted radiocarbon calibration to convert radiocarbon age to calendar age using CALIB 8.2 with the Marine20 calibration curve.
steps.searchable_summary: calibrate radiocarbon age to calendar age using CALIB 8.2

steps.description: Local marine reservoir age (ΔR) was estimated as − 200 ± 100 yr from 33 data from the East China Sea coast.
inputs: 33 data from East China Sea coast

steps.description: The K-Ah tephra age was 7252 ± 56 yr, estimated from Lake Suigetsu varve sediment.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate K-Ah tephra age from varve sediment

steps.description: Based on the radiocarbon and K-Ah tephra dates, the revised age model of Core KY07-04 PC01 was established.
steps.searchable_summary: establish revised age model using radiocarbon and tephra dates
